message:
test(fcp-bootstrap): expand test coverage across all bootstrap modules

Add comprehensive unit tests for CeremonyId uniqueness, ParticipantId
hashing, CeremonyPhase clone variants, ThresholdConfig boundary cases,
cold recovery round-trip serialization, error Display/From impls,
genesis block validation edge cases, phase transition invariants,
recovery phrase encoding/decoding, and time validation drift scenarios.

These tests harden the bootstrap ceremony pipeline against subtle
regression in ID generation, serialization fidelity, and phase-state
machine transitions that would be difficult to catch at integration level.

- ceremony.rs: +337 lines — CeremonyId, ParticipantId, CeremonyPhase, ThresholdConfig
- cold_recovery.rs: +159 lines — serialization round-trips, recovery edge cases
- error.rs: +129 lines — Display formatting, From conversions, error categorization
- genesis.rs: +160 lines — block validation, signature verification, genesis invariants
- phase.rs: +199 lines — phase transitions, timeout handling, quorum calculations
- recovery_phrase.rs: +131 lines — encoding, decoding, entropy validation
- time_validation.rs: +101 lines — clock drift, NTP sync, tolerance boundaries

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
